# Scenario: Subagent streaming — messages arrive in a child session
# Tests that:
#   1. Messages render before the sub-agent indicator
#   2. Indicator shows "Sub-agent session"
#   3. [Parent] button is present
#   4. Buffer is NOT read-only (can send messages)

:session ses_child1
:parent-id ses_parent1
:directory /tmp/test-project

# Session becomes busy
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child1","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}
:assert-busy

# Assistant message created
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst_child1","sessionID":"ses_child1","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1771415771266},"agent":"code","modelID":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","providerID":"anthropic","tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# Empty text part (bootstrap)
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text_child1","sessionID":"ses_child1","messageID":"msg_asst_child1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1771415789728}}}}}

# Streaming delta
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text_child1","sessionID":"ses_child1","messageID":"msg_asst_child1","type":"text","text":"subagent says hello","time":{"start":1771415789728}},"delta":"subagent says hello"}}}

:assert-contains subagent says hello
:assert-contains Sub-agent session

# Message appears BEFORE the sub-agent indicator
:eval (let ((msg-pos (save-excursion (goto-char (point-min)) (search-forward "subagent says hello" nil t))) (footer-pos (save-excursion (goto-char (point-min)) (search-forward "Sub-agent session" nil t)))) (should (and msg-pos footer-pos (< msg-pos footer-pos))))

# [Parent] button is present
:eval (should (save-excursion (goto-char (point-min)) (search-forward "[Parent]" nil t)))

# Buffer is NOT read-only (child sessions can now send messages)
:eval (should-not buffer-read-only)

# Finalized text part
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text_child1","sessionID":"ses_child1","messageID":"msg_asst_child1","type":"text","text":"subagent says hello","time":{"start":1771415789728,"end":1771415789728}}}}}

# Session goes idle
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child1","status":{"type":"idle"}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child1"}}}

:assert-idle
:assert-contains subagent says hello
